name: Calico Meringues
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar until foamy.
2. Gradually beat in sugar to make a stiff meringue.
3. Gently fold in the M&Ms.
4. Grease and flour a large cookie sheet.
5. Drop the meringue by teaspoons onto the cookie sheet.
6. Garnish each with an M&M.
7. Bake at 250 degrees for 30 minutes, or until firm to the touch but still white.
